goal: Add a distinct glow for UPRIGHT result cards (gold) alongside the existing reversed (purple) glow
fix: buildCardArt now tags every card with is-upright OR is-reversed (was reversed-only). reading.css §B2-5b: .card-art.is-upright .card-art-img gets a warm GOLD aura + mt-upright-glow keyframe (mirrors the reversed purple glow), with a prefers-reduced-motion off-switch. Orientation now reads at a glance: gold=upright, purple=reversed.
